# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest version of AfterStream is the only version that is supported, as it is the only version that is being actively developed.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

You can contact the AfterStream maintainers to report a vulnerability:

- Report the vulnerability in the [AfterStream Discord server](https://discord.gg/R8ke6EGVBn)

Discord is an OSS Discord alternative
